name: copm-onchain-analysis
description: Reproducible on-chain audit and analysis of Minteo's COPM (Colombian peso stablecoin) on Polygon and Celo. Scans every Transfer event directly from the contracts via RPC.

scripts.audit: npm run discover && npm run scan:fresh && npm run timestamps && npm run aggregate && npm run charts && npm run validate
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:polygon && npm run audit:celo && npm run charts:combined

author: Juan Sebastián Agudelo <juansac.me@gmail.com> (https://github.com/juansacdev)
